gross.description: Snake Slither: Belly crawl on the carpet for 10 seconds.

fine.description: Newspaper Scrunch: Use one hand to crumple a piece of paper into a ball.

hints: Listen to the sound: ssssss. Does your body feel like a wavy snake?
Try making a big 'S' shape with your arms while you crawl!
Uncle Ryan says: You're close! Keep that belly low to the ground like Sammy.

gross.description: Frog Jump: Squat deep and jump as high as you can 3 times.

fine.description: Lily Pad Tear: Tear a green piece of paper into 5 small strips.

hints: Take a big breath in... then HHH-OP!
Can you jump high enough to catch a fly?
Keep trying! Frog legs are super strong, and yours are too.
